prompt: Mockup of a turn-based magic duel game. POV of the player wizard facing off against a shadowy sorcerer. Spell cards float in a semicircle at the bottom of the screen. Mana bar, HP, and 'Cast' button included. Background is a crumbling ancient arena under a full moon. Stylized with glowing effects and dramatic lighting
prompt_refined: Generate an in-game screenshot of a turn-based magic duel game. The viewpoint is from just behind a player wizard, who is facing a shadowy sorcerer across a crumbling ancient arena. A large, luminous full moon is visible in the night sky above the arena. At the bottom of the screen, multiple glowing spell cards are arranged in a prominent semicircle. UI elements include a mana bar and an HP bar in the top-left corner, and a 'Cast' button positioned centrally above the spell card array. The scene is depicted with dramatic lighting, strong shadows, and bright magical glowing effects.
objects: multiple glowing spell cards (arranged in a prominent semicircle at the bottom of the screen)
'Cast' button (positioned centrally above the spell card array)
